nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Existing audio signal in the local chain (receives additive mix)

nodes.label: Pop from Signal Buffer
nodes.description: Reads audio from shared GlobalRoutingManager Signal buffer and adds it to local signal (addWithMultiply)

nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: Linear gain multiplier (0..1) for the received signal

nodes.label: Spec Match Check
nodes.description: Verifies sample rate, channels, block size match sender

nodes.label: Audio Out
nodes.description: Original signal + received signal mixed together
